website_summary: Bright Smile Dental is a multi-location dental practice offering general, cosmetic, and orthodontic services. The website emphasizes patient comfort and modern equipment but lacks online scheduling capabilities.
weak_lead_capture_signals: No online booking or scheduling form
Contact page only shows phone number and address
No email capture or newsletter signup
No chatbot or live chat widget
operational_clues: Office hours listed as M-F 8am-5pm only
urgency_signals: Recently added a third dentist to the team
Website copyright shows current year, suggesting active maintenance
decision_maker_clues: Practice owner Dr. James listed as lead dentist
Office manager Sarah handles administrative inquiries
tone_brand_clues: Emphasis on modern technology and comfort
